changes: Added stop() call in start() when flag disabled
Added exported stop() function to clear timer
Changed cache from Map<string, Explanation> to Map<string, {value, ts}>
Cache read checks TTL before returning
Cache write evicts oldest entry when at max capacity
Added sdkOrder and modelOrder tracking arrays
Replaced 2 s.sdk.set() calls with lruSet(s.sdk, sdkOrder, ...)
Replaced s.models.set() call with lruSet(s.models, modelOrder, ...)
